title: Opus voice and release notes
notes: Dispatch workstations running safeT Command (desktop installer).
changes: Web console Opus transmit now works correctly on Android handsets.
Admin Downloads shows previous Android and desktop builds with expandable release notes.
Transmission log vocoder preview reads the correct 16 kHz audio from recordings.

title: Codec2 and Opus on channels
changes: Channels can use Codec2 3200 or Opus instead of IMBE where configured.
Mission Control and the dispatch console decode inbound Opus from handsets.
Android jitter buffer reduces cut-outs on bursty network audio.

title: Clearer transmission log transcripts
changes: The transmission log records clear voice for better Whisper transcripts.
Radios and the console send clear audio sideband for every channel.
